message:
feat: add recall function and render helpers for genome search

Implements recall(genome, query) which searches the genome for relevant
agents, memories, and routing hints. Adds renderMemories() and
renderRoutingHints() for XML block output. Changes Genome.memories
visibility from private to public readonly for recall access.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
